name: Attacking Graph Foundation Models Through Their Shared Representation
summary: arXiv:2607.18567v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: A graph foundation model generalizes across graph domains by mapping every input into one shared representation before any task reasoning. We call th...
description: arXiv:2607.18567v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: A graph foundation model generalizes across graph domains by mapping every input into one shared representation before any task reasoning. We call this map the alignment layer, the component that separates a graph foundation model from a graph neural network, and we show it is a distinct attack surface that prior work has not studied. We attack it...
author: Pankaj Kumar, Subhankar Mishra
